title: Zed + Gemma-4 12B & Qwen-3.6: HOW IS THIS POSSIBLE?! THIS IS CRAZY!
summary: Zed editor now supports running local AI models via LM Studio, Ollama, and llama.cpp for on-device code assistance without cloud dependencies. Users can run models like Gemma-4 12B and Qwen locally for code explanations, refactoring, and boilerplate generation while maintaining code privacy.
